description: Plan for distributing recovered funds to affected parties. Recipients are tracked individually with allocations and on-chain settlement status.
name: DistributionPlan

modules.description: Plan and execute distribution of recovered funds
modules.name: planning

operations.description: Update methodology and total available amount
operations.name: SET_METHODOLOGY
operations.reducer:
if (action.input.methodology) state.methodology = action.input.methodology;
if (action.input.totalAvailable) state.totalAvailable = action.input.totalAvailable;
operations.template: Update methodology and total available amount

errors.description: Cannot add recipient outside of DRAFT
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

errors.description: Recipient with same address+chain already exists
errors.name: DuplicateRecipientError

operations.name: ADD_RECIPIENT
operations.schema:
input AddRecipientInput {
    id: OID!
    address: EthereumAddress!
    chainId: Int!
    allocatedAmount: Amount_Tokens!
    rationale: String
}

errors.description: Cannot update recipient outside of DRAFT
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: UPDATE_RECIPIENT

errors.description: Cannot remove recipient outside of DRAFT
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: REMOVE_RECIPIENT

errors.description: Cannot approve plan outside of DRAFT
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: APPROVE_PLAN
operations.reducer:
if (state.status !== 'DRAFT') throw new InvalidStatusTransitionError(`Cannot approve plan in status ${state.status}`);
state.status = 'APPROVED';

operations.description: Mark a recipient payout as sent on-chain

errors.description: Plan must be approved before sending
errors.name: PlanNotApprovedError

operations.name: MARK_RECIPIENT_SENT
operations.template: Mark a recipient payout as sent on-chain

operations.description: Mark a recipient payout as failed
operations.name: MARK_RECIPIENT_FAILED
operations.template: Mark a recipient payout as failed

operations.description: Mark a recipient payout as refunded
operations.name: MARK_RECIPIENT_REFUNDED
operations.template: Mark a recipient payout as refunded

operations.description: Mark distribution as complete (all recipients SENT or REFUNDED)

errors.description: Cannot complete plan outside of EXECUTING with all recipients done
errors.name: InvalidStatusTransitionError

operations.name: COMPLETE_DISTRIBUTION
operations.template: Mark distribution as complete (all recipients SENT or REFUNDED)

operations.name: CANCEL_PLAN
operations.reducer:
if (state.status === 'COMPLETED' || state.status === 'CANCELLED') throw new InvalidStatusTransitionError(`Cannot cancel plan in status ${state.status}`);
state.status = 'CANCELLED';

operations.description: Add a reference to a DAO approval (Snapshot, on-chain vote, etc.)
operations.name: ADD_APPROVAL_REF
operations.template: Add a reference to a DAO approval (Snapshot, on-chain vote, etc.)

global.schema:
type DistributionPlanState {
    status: DistributionStatus!
    methodology: String
    totalAvailable: Amount_Tokens
    recipients: [DistributionRecipient!]!
    approvalRefs: [ApprovalRef!]!
}

enum DistributionStatus {
    DRAFT
    APPROVED
    EXECUTING
    COMPLETED
    CANCELLED
}

enum RecipientStatus {
    PLANNED
    SENT
    FAILED
    REFUNDED
}

type DistributionRecipient {
    id: OID!
    address: EthereumAddress!
    chainId: Int!
    allocatedAmount: Amount_Tokens!
    rationale: String
    status: RecipientStatus!
    txHash: String
}

type ApprovalRef {
    id: OID!
    url: URL!
    label: String!
}
